---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem you're trying to solve

What's the user-facing situation that this feature would address? What are
you currently unable to do, or doing the hard way?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like the app to do. UI sketches, mockups, or comparable
features in other tools are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why they're worse.

## Additional context

Datasets, traits, plots, or external references that motivate the request.
